title: Quantitative Reverse Transcriptase-PCR Analysis
author: Kiichi Hirota
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.v7ne9me

steps.instruction: Total RNA was purified using RNeasy™ (Qiagen, Valencia, CA, USA).
For cDNA synthesis, 1 µg of total RNA was reverse transcribed using QuantiTect Reverse Transcription Kit (Qiagen).
Real-time PCR was performed using QuantiTect SYBR green PCR kit (Qiagen). PCR primers were purchased from Qiagen.
Amplification and detection were performed using Rotor-Gene Q real-time PCR cycler (Qiagen). The change in expression of each target mRNA was calculated relative to the level of 18S rRNA.
